judge_reason: Description A states two hole-punch marks on the left margin, while Description B states three punched holes on the left edge and two punched holes near the bottom center, creating a direct contradiction on the count and location of hole-punch marks.
original_image_tags: A dark, vertical rectangular document page with two hole-punch marks visible on the left margin. The top and bottom of the page are stamped "RESTRICTED" in faint, capital letters. A handwritten number "119" appears in the bottom right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A dark scanned document page stamped “RESTRICTED” at the top and bottom, with a typed paragraph describing an oval object sighting; two punched binder holes are visible along the left edge and a handwritten “119” appears at the lower right.*
